steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Namaste! I'm Emersyn, and this is MY world! I'm so excited you're here!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: I'm 6 years old and I love doing SO many things — dancing, karate, makeup, and eating yummy gol gappe!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Tap on different rooms to explore Emersyn's house and beyond!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Let's start in my bedroom! That's where all my cool stuff is!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Tap the bedroom to begin your adventure!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Yay, the kitchen! I love making snacks here. Mummy taught me how to make chai — but I like Frooti better, hehe!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: In the kitchen, you can cook delicious treats! Tap the recipe book to see what you can make.

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Ooh, can we make french fries? They're crispy and SO good with ketchup!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Drag the ingredients to the cooking area. Follow the steps to complete your dish!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: When it's done, I get to eat it! Maybe I'll share with Ava... maybe!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: This is my favorite part — picking outfits! I have lehengas for Diwali and sparkly dresses for parties!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Open the wardrobe to see all of Emersyn's clothes and accessories!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Don't forget the makeup! I want pink lipstick and sparkly eyeshadow!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Drag clothes onto Emersyn to dress her up. Mix and match to create fun looks!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: And nail polish too! Purple is my favorite. Let's get fancy!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Welcome to my garden! Mummy grows marigolds here for making rangoli during Diwali!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: In the garden, you can plant flowers and vegetables. Tap the seed bag to start!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: I want to grow sunflowers! They're big and yellow like the sun!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Plant seeds in the soil, then water them. Come back later to see them grow!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Buddy loves running around here! Don't dig up my flowers, Buddy!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: School is so fun because Ava and Mia are there! And Leo always has cool books!

steps.speaker: teacher
steps.text: Good morning, Emersyn! Are you ready to learn something new today?

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: At school, you can do fun activities! Tap on a subject to start learning.

steps.speaker: ava
steps.text: Emersyn, let's sit together! I saved you a seat!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: After class, we can play on the playground! Race you to the swings, Ava!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: OMG, the mall! I love the escalators — up and down, up and down! Wheee!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: At the shop, you can buy clothes, toys, and treats! Look at all the items!

steps.speaker: shopkeeper
steps.text: Welcome, little one! We have new bangles and hair clips today!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Ooh, and can we go to the food court? I want popcorn chicken and Frooti!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Tap on items to buy them. Don't forget to check your coins!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: It's dance time! I know all the moves from the reels I watch on my tablet!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Follow the dance moves by tapping the arrows when they light up!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: This song is SO good! It's the one everyone is dancing to on YouTube!

steps.speaker: ava
steps.text: Emersyn, you're such a good dancer! Teach me that step!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Get a perfect score to unlock new dance moves and songs!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: HAI-YAH! Welcome to my karate dojo! I'm working on getting my next belt!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Practice your kata by following the move patterns on screen!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: My sensei says I'm really good at kicks! Watch this — KIYA!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Swipe in the direction shown to perform each karate move correctly!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: If I practice hard, I'll earn a new belt! I want the yellow one next!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: These are my babies! Whiskers the cat, Buddy the dog, and Cotton the bunny!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Your pets need food, water, and lots of love! Check their happiness meters.

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Whiskers loves chin scratches, and Buddy wants to play fetch ALL the time!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Tap on a pet to feed them, play with them, or give them a bath!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: Cotton is so fluffy! She likes carrots, just like in cartoons!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: FINALLY! We're making a reel! I watch these on my tablet all day — now I get to make one!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: First, pick a fun background for your video! Tap to choose.

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: I want the one with sparkles! Or maybe the Holi colors one with all the pink and blue!

steps.speaker: narrator
steps.text: Now pick a song and record your dance! Add stickers and effects to make it pop!

steps.speaker: emersyn
steps.text: This is going to be SO cool! Ava is going to be so jealous! Ready? 3, 2, 1... ACTION!
